title: Sealapack SAP036 LARGE TIE HANDLE FREEZER BAGS, KITCHEN ESSENTIAL, PACK of 100, 26 x 40cm, Clear
features: FREEZER TIPS: Sealapack Large Tie Handle Freezer Bags are easy to use, place food in the bag, expel the air and tie the handles together for a secure seal. Do not overfill the bag

TIME SAVING: Prepare chopped fresh ingredients you regularly use, such as chopped onions and garlic, carrots and leeks, add to bag and freeze. Remove bag from freezer, pierce the top of the bag to allow steam to escape whilst defrosting in a microwave.

REDUCE WASTE: Portion fresh food of leftovers before freezing to avoid waste, making it easier to defrost only what you need. Defrost food in the fridge to keep it chilled. Once thawed use as soon as possible

VERSATILE: The large bags can also be used to store dried food items such as cereal, pasta, rice or pulses in a cupboard. Tie the handles, open to remove the portion size required, re-tie the handles and store
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: BOX OF 100 BAGS
description: Product Description Sealapack Large Tie Handle Freezer Bags are easy to use. Place food in the bag, expel the air and tie the handles together for a secure seal. Do not overfill the bag. Prepare chopped fresh ingredients you regularly use, such as chopped onions and garlic, carrots and leeks, add to bag and freeze. Remove bag from freezer, pierce the top of the bag to allow steam to escape whilst defrosting in a microwave. Portion fresh food of leftovers before freezing to avoid waste, making it easier to defrost only what you need. Defrost food in the fridge to keep it chilled. Once thawed use as soon as possible. Box of 100 bags, 26 x 40cm Legal Disclaimer danger of suffocation, keep out of reach of children
